SCENE_LINK_VIEW.SETTINGS.shiftActivate.name: Shift Key Activate
SCENE_LINK_VIEW.SETTINGS.shiftActivate.hint: When enabled, holding shift when clicking a scene link activates the scene.

SCENE_LINK_VIEW.SETTINGS.ctrlJournal.name: Control Key Journal
SCENE_LINK_VIEW.SETTINGS.ctrlJournal.hint: When enabled, holding control when clicking a scene link opens the journal.

SCENE_LINK_VIEW.SETTINGS.playerView.name: Player View
SCENE_LINK_VIEW.SETTINGS.playerView.hint: Allows players to view a scene by clicking a scene document link. Requires the scene to be available to all players in the navigation bar.

SCENE_LINK_VIEW.WARNING.noView: You are not allowed to view the scene. Sorry :(
SCENE_LINK_VIEW.WARNING.noJournal: There is no journal to show.
